positive: A stylized, whimsical cosmic wildlife illustration centered composition. Focus on detailed black and white ink line art and clean, solid color fills (teal, gold, deep navy). The main subject is a graceful stylized crescent moon entangled with nebula elements, surrounded by silhouettes of diverse woodland creatures (foxes, owls, deer, hummingbirds) and stylized botanicals (ferns, lavender). The style is a mix of vintage tattoo art and mid-century modern decorative illustration. Strong central composition, high contrast, clean vector look, crisp outlines, and suitable for a single-color print on fabric. Minimal gradient work, maximum graphic impact. Intricate detail, perfect symmetry, rule of thirds composition.
negative: artifacts, blur, text, watermark, logo, signature, cropped, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, poorly drawn, cartoon, ugly, noise, grain
